PreToolUse.command: node -e "const cmd = JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('/dev/stdin','utf8')).command || ''; const blocked = ['rm -rf','DROP TABLE','DELETE FROM','truncate']; const found = blocked.find(b => cmd.toLowerCase().includes(b.toLowerCase())); process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify(found ? {action:'block', message:'Command blocked by security policy: ' + found} : {action:'allow'}));"

SessionStart.command: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const csproj = fs.readdirSync('.', {withFileTypes:true}).find(d => d.isFile() && d.name.endsWith('.csproj')); const sln = fs.readdirSync('.', {withFileTypes:true}).find(d => d.isFile() && d.name.endsWith('.sln')); const artifact = (sln && sln.name) || (csproj && csproj.name) || 'N/A'; process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({context: 'Project: ai-work-research | Stack: C# + Markdown | Primary .NET artifact: ' + artifact}));"
